meta.title: Support Open-Source AI Tools & Document Intelligence | Amphibian Labs
meta.description: Support Amphibian Labs open-source work, including AI document intelligence, automation blueprints, technical guides, testing, and infrastructure. Donations fund development, documentation, and community resources.

hero.title: Support open source
hero.subtitle: Amphibian Labs builds practical tools and gives them away where open access matters. Your support helps keep that work moving.

items.title: Fund real tools, not promises
items.body: Every contribution supports practical software, test coverage, documentation, infrastructure, and release work. DocIQ alone represents serious engineering effort across OCR, document parsing, validation, healthcare data structures, and backend architecture.

items.title: Keep AI accessible
items.body: Enterprise AI tools can be expensive and opaque. Open-source alternatives give smaller teams a way to inspect, adapt, and build responsibly.

items.title: Support independent work
items.body: Amphibian Labs is funded through client work and community support, not ads or venture capital. That independence matters - it means we can build what is useful, not only what is fundable.

supporter.label: Supporter
supporter.description: Help cover small but constant costs like hosting, CI/CD, domains, and project maintenance.

builder.label: Builder
builder.description: Help fund new capabilities, test coverage, examples, and documentation.

champion.label: Champion
champion.description: Sponsor a meaningful release or focused development sprint.

transparency.title: Where your donation goes
transparency.note: Client revenue covers business operations. Donations support open-source work.

payment.note: Payments are processed securely via Stripe. Questions? Email us at

cta.title: Prefer to contribute code?
cta.body: Pull requests, bug reports, documentation improvements, and examples are welcome. Every contribution matters.
